Job Details

Company

Job Details

INSTITUTE OF PRECISION MEDICINE, is located in the beautiful city, Huangzhou, China. The research institute has domestic first-class and international advanced level. The research institute has six research centers such as Translational Medicine Research, Cell Therapy Research, Cardiovascular Disease Research. The Institute of Precision Medicine has established a world-class research technology platform, including the Artificial Intelligence and Biotechnology Center and the Center for Efficacy and Safety Evaluation of Medicine.

We are recruiting outstanding scientists to join the institute. The open positions include postdoctoral research associate, assistant professor, associate professor and full professor. We also recruit center directors.

 

Both Chinese and non-Chinese nationals are eligible to apply. We will provide generous start-up fund, competitive salary (postdoc about 320K RMB, faculty upon negotiation) and other health and retirement benefits. Applicants should submit their application in a single PDF file to jzchenggong@163.com
